name: Rhubarb Honey-Lemon-Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped rhubarb, sugar, flour, salt, lemon rind or juice.
2. Mix in honey and red food coloring until well combined. Set aside while preparing the pastry.
3. Pour the rhubarb mixture into the pre-prepared piecrust.
4. Dot the top with small pieces of butter.
5. Place the second crust on top and trim any excess dough around the edges.
6. Brush the edges with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
7. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 15 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
